---
title: "Week 9: Temperature"
---

## Summary 

This week we looked closely at SAR data and ways to analyse temperature data using GEE during our practical.

### SAR data and polarisation

-   SAR data and polarisation

    -   discuss limitations

-   amplitude and phase

    -   useful for change

-   using Landsat and MODIS for temperature

## Applications

-   compare 2 articles

## Reflections

-   Image fusion interest

-   insar data limitations
